understanding.goal_understanding: The objective was to complete each level by moving the selectable piece(s) so that every goal tile marked '+' is occupied by a selectable at the same time (with multi-goal levels requiring all goals to be covered simultaneously), progressing through all levels within the per-level step budget.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions (MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT/UP/DOWN) attempted to shift the currently selected piece by one grid cell (3 pixels) in the chosen direction, but walls/boundaries and other objects could prevent movement; some adjacent objects were pushable so the selected piece could push them if there was space; walls could block in different ways depending on their type/placement; the movement_blocked flags were only hints and didn’t guarantee failure; when multiple selectables existed, CLICK with the exact pixel coordinate of another selectable switched control to that piece.

history.summary: Level 1 attempt 2/2 failed after 64 turns. No attempts remaining.
Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: The objective was to complete each level by moving the selectable piece(s) so that every goal tile marked '+' is occupied by a selectable at the same time (with multi-goal levels requiring all goals to be covered simultaneously), progressing through all levels within the per-level step budget.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions (MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT/UP/DOWN) attempted to shift the currently selected piece by one grid cell (3 pixels) in the chosen direction, but walls/boundaries and other objects could prevent movement; some adjacent objects were pushable so the selected piece could push them if there was space; walls could block in different ways depending on their type/placement; the movement_blocked flags were only hints and didn’t guarantee failure; when multiple selectables existed, CLICK with the exact pixel coordinate of another selectable switched control to that piece.
